channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Aspyr Pushes Back On Tomb Raider 1-3 Remastered Outfits Backlash, Insists 'No AI Generated Assets Were Used'  IGN
  3. "Crystal Dynamics Should Issue A Partial Refund For Forcing This On Us" - Tomb Raider Remastered's New Outfits Aren't Going Down Well  Time Extension
  4. The remastered collection of the first Tomb Raider games just got a controversial patch with some truly terrible-looking new outfits: 'Lara deserves better than this'  PC Gamer
  5. Tomb Raider I-III Remastered: New outfits and Challenge Mode added in free update today  PlayStation.Blog

item.title: The way you walk can reveal your true feelings - Phys.org
item.description:
1. The way you walk can reveal your true feelings  Phys.org
  2. How you walk reveals to others how you are feeling, researchers say  The Guardian
  3. Psychologist Says if You Always Walk Faster Than Others, You Likely Have These 7 Traits  Parade
  4. This is what your walk says about your personality, according to new study  UNILAD
  5. What your WALK says about you: Study reveals how your swagger can reveal how you're really feeling  Daily Mail
